findings.description: Section s1 is titled "Ant Javadocタスクの設定方法" (an h3 subsection in the source), but its content actually covers three separate h2-level sections from the source: 概要, ツール配置場所, and 使用方法, in addition to parts of the Ant Javadocタスクの設定方法 subsection. The title misrepresents the scope of the section.
findings.source_evidence: Source h2 headings: 概要, ツール配置場所, 使用方法 (h2); Ant Javadocタスクの設定方法 (h3 under 使用方法). All h2 content is merged into s1, but s1 carries only the h3 title.
